Title: Test Insertion/Modification of Plants
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Insertion/Modifica Piante use case
2. Enter valid plant data
3. Click on the "Save" button
Expected Result: The plant data is saved successfully

Title: Test Reading Plants
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Lettura Piante use case
2. Verify that the list of plants is displayed
Expected Result: The list of plants is displayed correctly

Title: Test User Information
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Informazioni Utente use case
2. Verify that the user's information is displayed
Expected Result: The user's information is displayed correctly

Title: Test Authentication Sequence
Test Steps:
1. Request token from the local user
2. Send token for authentication
3. Receive authentication status
4. Request user data
5. Create new LocalUser instance
6. Complete authentication process

Title: Test Plant Addition Sequence
Test Steps:
1. Request for plant species identification
2. Receive plant species response
3. Insert the species into the storage
4. Confirm the insertion
5. Upload the new photo to the correct folder
6. Receive the download URL of the uploaded photo

Title: Test Reading Plant Data Sequence
Test Steps:
1. Request personal storage path
2. Receive personal storage path
3. Request photos for each species present
4. Receive download URLs for each requested photo
Expected Result: The plant data is displayed correctly
